doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core statutory citation and 5-day notice requirement are genuine, but the document embellishes with likely fabricated details (such as the email service provision and "conformed text 2024" framing) not found in the actual statute.
